name: Cats Organized Neatly
short_description: In this 2D puzzle game you have the responsibility to arrange your feline friends in a way that fits the grid. Cats Organized Neatly comes with 80 different handcrafted levels and a whole bunch of cats in all shapes and sizes.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Cats Organized Neatly!


So, you have decided to become a crazy cat person.
Or you just like cats?
If that’s the case you are definitely at the right place! Because we have cats! 30 of them to be exact. They come in all shapes and sizes and… we’ve kinda lost track of all of them.

If you could take some time and just help us organize the little ones. Just pick them up and place them on the grid over there.
And don’t worry, they won’t bite even if you rotate them a bit.



KEY FEATURES

  • Cats
    30 unique hand drawn cats for you to befriend, collect and organize (neatly).
  • Handcrafted Levels
    The games come with 80 handcrafted levels which will hopefully tickle your brain.
  • Simple Controls
    The game can be played by just clicking the left and right mouse buttons, which makes it very accessible for newcomers or seasoned puzzlers of any age.
  • Relaxing Music
    Cats Organized Neatly has relaxing background music, resembling the atmosphere of a Cat Café. Sit down and pet some cats.

supported_languages: English, Korean, Simplified Chinese, Italian, Japanese, Dutch, Russian, Ukrainian, Finnish, German, Spanish - Spain, Turkish, French, Czech, Norwegian, Swedish, Spanish - Latin America, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Greek, Hungarian, Slovak
